prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built **AM107** (4.7L V8 from the Maserati 450S) with forged internals (JE Pistons 9.5:1 CR, Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a **Weber 48 IDA carburetor setup** (dual-throttle bodies with velocity stacks) for a target of 400+ HP at 7,500 RPM, utilizing a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission** with a **Centerforce DFX dual-friction clutch** and a **Quaife ATB helical LSD**

Custom **equal-length stainless steel headers** (designed by Tubistyle Italy) feeding into a **Borla Pro XS 2.5" cat-back exhaust** with quad 4.5" polished tips, paired with a **MagnaFlow 2.5" high-flow catalytic converter** to maintain Euro 2 emissions compliance while optimizing scavenging

Full **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Ghibli I’s double-wishbone front and De Dion rear suspension) with **Eibach ERS 1400N/m front and 1200N/m rear springs**, **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer)** for the subframe and control arms, and **Brembo GT 6-piston 380mm front/4-piston 355mm rear brake kit** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Motul RBF 660 brake fluid**
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (modified to fit the Ghibli I’s unique chassis) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (hand-laid by Capristo) and **adjustable rear diffuser** (3D-printed in PETG for weight savings), paired with **OEM-style LED taillights (Luxxen LX-MAS-GHIBLI)** and **Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones** (7" diameter, Cibie mounting brackets)

Custom **interior retrim by Saddleback Leather** featuring **full aniline leather (Maserati ‘Rosso Montecarlo’)** with **diamond-stitched door cards**, **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede grip)** on a **NRG quick-release hub**, and **Recaro SRD-E seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara centers)** with **Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses**

Engine bay detailing with **custom aluminum radiator support (CNC-machined by Rad Rides)** to clear the Weber carb setup, **polished stainless steel braided lines (Goodridge G-Stop)** for fuel and brake systems, and **custom carbon fiber valve covers (hand-made by Fiber Fab Italia)** with **Maserati ‘Trident’ laser-etched logos**
